<mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="800" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0" /><mxCell id="1" parent="0" /><mxCell id="customer" value="Customer
Web / Mobile" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#08427B;strokeColor=#073B6F;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="60" y="60" width="130" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="admin" value="Administrator
Internal" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#08427B;strokeColor=#073B6F;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="240" y="60" width="130" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="aws" value="AWS Cloud" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#FF9900;dashed=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#FF9900;startSize=24;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="180" width="1080" height="760" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="apigw" value="API Gateway

Single HTTPS entry point. Validates Cognito JWTs." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#3070B3;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="40" y="50" width="170" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="alb" value="ALB

Routes requests to Fargate services by path prefix." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#3070B3;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="40" y="180" width="170" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="users" value="Users Service
Node.js / Fargate

Accounts, Cognito sync, soft-delete." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#3070B3;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="290" y="40" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="orders" value="Orders Service
Node.js / Fargate

Order lifecycle. gRPC to Tracking." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#3070B3;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="290" y="170" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="tracking" value="Tracking Service
Node.js / Fargate

Shipment events. gRPC receiver." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#3070B3;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="290" y="300" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="sqsu" value="users-events
SQS Queue" style="shape=mxgraph.aws4.sqs;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="540" y="50" width="80" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="sqso" value="orders-events
SQS Queue" style="shape=mxgraph.aws4.sqs;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="540" y="190" width="80" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="lamu" value="users-write-handler
Lambda" style="shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D86613;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="720" y="50" width="80" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="lamo" value="orders-write-handler
Lambda" style="shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D86613;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="720" y="190" width="80" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbu" value="Users DB
DocumentDB" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="900" y="40" width="80" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbo" value="Orders DB
DocumentDB" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="900" y="180" width="80" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbt" value="Tracking DB
DocumentDB" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="900" y="320" width="80" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="cognito" value="Amazon Cognito
JWT issuer" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#999999;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="40" y="500" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="param" value="Parameter Store
Secrets" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#999999;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="290" y="500" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="signoz" value="SigNoz
Observability" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#999999;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="aws"><mxGeometry x="540" y="500" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c1" value="HTTPS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="customer" target="apigw"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c2" value="HTTPS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="admin" target="apigw"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c3" value="Validates JWT" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" target="cognito"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c4" value="Forwards" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" target="alb"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c5" value="/users/*" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" target="users"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c6" value="/orders/*" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" target="orders"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c7" value="/tracking/*" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" target="tracking"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c8" value="gRPC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="users" target="orders"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c9" value="gRPC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="orders" target="tracking"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c10" value="Publishes" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="users" target="sqsu"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c11" value="Publishes" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="orders" target="sqso"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c12" value="Triggers" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="sqsu" target="lamu"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c13" value="Triggers" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="sqso" target="lamo"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c14" value="Writes" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="lamu" target="dbu"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c15" value="Writes" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="lamo" target="dbo"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c16" value="Reads (replica)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="users" target="dbu"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c17" value="Reads (replica)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="orders" target="dbo"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c18" value="Reads/Writes" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="tracking" target="dbt"><mxGeometry relative="1" source="orders" target="signoz"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>
